title: thelymitra media
intro: Thelymitra media, also known as the brown-veined sun orchid, is a species of orchid found in Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Thelymitra media include reducing inflammation, treating skin conditions such as eczema, and soothing digestive issues. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions for internal and topical use.
